sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2023-10-01 10:15:30');
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time > timestamp '2023-09-01 00:00:00';
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = timestamp '2023-11-01 12:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time < timestamp '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
